Package io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.test.handler

Class TestServerRegisterProcessorHandler

java.lang.Object
io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.test.handler.TestServerRegisterProcessorHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
ServerRegisterProcessorHandler
@Component @Primary public class TestServerRegisterProcessorHandler extends Object implements ServerRegisterProcessorHandler
测试专用的ServerRegisterProcessorHandler实现 用于验证REGISTER请求的处理流程
Author:
claude
